# Aitotech — llms.txt

> AitoTech is an AI company in Delhi, India.
> Aksh is India's Cursor alternative — code in the browser with Omni AI.

## Company
- Name: AitoTech
- Website: https://aitotech.in
- Email: info@aitotech.in

## Product: Aksh
- URL: https://aitotech.in/aksh
- What: AI coding platform — browser IDE (Aksh Studio), Omni AI, cloud projects
- vs Cursor: browser first, data in India (E2E Networks plan), one AI named Omni
- Waitlist: https://aitotech.in/aksh#waitlist
- Press: https://aitotech.in/aksh/press
- Docs: https://aitotech.in/docs

## FAQ
- Q: Is Aksh like Cursor?
  A: Yes. Both use AI to write code. Aksh runs in the browser and plans to host data in India.
- Q: What is Omni?
  A: The one AI users talk to in Aksh. No model picker.
